pageTemplates.description: Structured internal template for PRDs, technical specs, and review notes.
pageTemplates.defaultSummary: Capture the decision, scope, and review outcome in a format that is easy to scan.

defaultSections.title: Context
defaultSections.body: Explain why this document exists and what prompted the review.

defaultSections.title: Problem
defaultSections.body: Describe the user, product, or technical problem that needs to be solved.

defaultSections.title: Proposal
defaultSections.body: Summarize the recommended direction and the main changes it introduces.

defaultSections.title: Tradeoffs
defaultSections.body: Call out what the proposal deliberately does not solve or optimize.

defaultSections.title: Risks
defaultSections.body: List product, technical, and coordination risks together with mitigation ideas.

defaultSections.title: Open Questions
defaultSections.body: Capture the unresolved items that must be answered before approval.

defaultSections.title: Decision
defaultSections.body: Record the review outcome, owners, and next actions.
